title: copy into missing separator doesn't represent true error line
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fulltext (documentid Int64 NOT NULL, seq Int16 NOT NULL, trigram FixedString(3) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO fulltext (documentid, seq, trigram) VALUES (1, 1, 'abc');
INSERT INTO fulltext (documentid, seq, trigram) VALUES (2, 2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM fulltext WHERE trigram IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO fulltext SELECT * FROM file('/path/to/data.csv', 'CSV');
key_bug_features: missing separator in copy into operation
